name: English Peas and New Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 Lb. fresh English peas or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the English peas with water.
2. Simmer for 15 minutes, covered.
3. Scrape the potatoes and place them in a separate pot.
4. Cover the potatoes with water and simmer until they are half done.
5. Drain the potatoes and add them to the English peas.
6. Add 2 cups of milk and 2 tablespoons of butter to the mixture.
7. Finish cooking the potatoes until they are done.
8. Mix 3 tablespoons of flour with some water.
9. Gradually add this mixture to the dish, stirring slowly until thickened.
10. Salt to taste.
